channel.title: Soumyadeep Pradhan - Blog
channel.description: Notes on engineering, software craft, and the occasional detour into other things. By Soumyadeep Pradhan, Full-Stack Developer at JPMorgan Chase.

item.title: Building CodeScope: Visualizing Codebases with AI
item.description: How I designed an AI-assisted system that turns sprawling repositories into navigable mental models.
item.author: contact@soumya.io (Soumyadeep Pradhan)

item.title: Six things I learned in my first year as an SDE2
item.description: The unwritten rules of mid-level engineering, what I wish someone had told me on day one.
item.author: contact@soumya.io (Soumyadeep Pradhan)

item.title: What singing taught me about writing software
item.description: A short essay on practice, restraint, and why your hobbies make you a better engineer.
item.author: contact@soumya.io (Soumyadeep Pradhan)
